creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-09 08:42:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    russian              Makefile 
  Added files:
    russian/p5-Convert-Cyrillic Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Convert::Cyrillic is a Perl module. It implements routine for converting from
  one cyrillic charset to another. It is intended to be used from cgi's which
  need built-in support for translations. For example, you may wish to use it in
  form processor to translate from user encoding to one used by your site.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/cyrillic/
  
  PR:             ports/134332
  Submitted by:   Sergey Kandaurov <pluknet at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.95      +1 -0      ports/russian/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/russian/p5-Convert-Cyrillic/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/russian/p5-Convert-Cyrillic/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/russian/p5-Convert-Cyrillic/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/russian/p5-Convert-Cyrillic/pkg-plist (new)
